$description: Type system — fonts + semantic roles. Latin renders in the house display/sans; Korean and CJK automatically fall back to Pretendard so Korean UI keeps a consistent, intentional identity instead of the OS default. Roles are emitted as Tailwind v4 --text-* with companion line-height / letter-spacing / font-weight, so one class (text-h1, text-body, ...) carries the whole spec.

fonts.sans: "Hanken Grotesk", "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif
fonts.mono: "IBM Plex Mono", "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace
fonts.display: "Hanken Grotesk", "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif
